title: What Spark Lab Has to Offer You
excerpt: Spark Lab is a unique product creation lab that encourages innovation and invention amongst students, researchers, and the public. We provide a space where concepts become reality, and anyone interest...
content:
Spark Lab is a unique product creation lab that encourages innovation and invention amongst students, researchers, and the public. We provide a space where concepts become reality, and anyone interested in developing a product can access advice and the tools they need to succeed.

Our team of industry experts offers a wealth of knowledge to guide you through the phases of product creation, bringing together expertise in innovation, engineering, science outreach, and project management. We specialize in electronics, optics, and the prototyping phase of product development. Whether you’re seeking assistance with the technical specifications of your product or business advice, we’re available to help you bring your ideas to life.

Our innovation lab offers a versatile space where you can bring your ideas to life. With comprehensive resources for prototyping, including 3D printing, and a range of tools for coding and electronics projects, you'll find everything you need to turn concepts into reality. The lab also fosters entrepreneurship, providing access to essential resources and connecting you with local entrepreneurs. In this collaborative environment, you have the opportunity to work alongside like-minded individuals, enhancing your projects through shared expertise and creative connections.

For budding entrepreneurs and innovators, Spark Lab is also an excellent place to network and connect with peers in the invention space. You will meet like-minded individuals and form collaborative partnerships with other creators within the community, empowering your vision and creating the spark for ongoing innovation.

Anyone who has an idea they would like to develop and bring to fruition is welcome to visit Spark Lab. Our goal is to bridge the gap between experimentation and the real-world solutions that accompany research.

If you’d like to get involved, stop by our drop-in sessions every Thursday at 2 p.m., or volunteer with us to help drive innovation and make a difference in our community.
